title: Tiny Coal
description: Simply allow you to break Coal/Charcoal down to 8 pieces that smelt 1 item.
body:
Based off the Tiny Coal found in Actually Additions.

Adds 2 items to the game: Tiny Coal and Tiny Charcoal that give smaller burn time
